name: mbn-theme/mission-section
title: Mission Section
description: Mission section with images, text blocks, and center shield icon

topHeading.default: Our mission is clearcut. To provide elite-level protective services, safety training and emergency readiness resources to at-risk individuals and institutions - regardless of their ability to pay.

leftText.default: Those who serve should never be left unprotected. We partner with licensed, carefully vetted security professionals,

rightText.default: including both armed and unarmed protective personnel, as well as highly experienced security trainers.

bottomText.default: We bring serious, effective protection capabilities to innocent people who would otherwise go unprotected. We are the line in the sand.
